1. Prediction: Yes

Since the patient is explicitly diagnosed with a form of lipid abnormality (hypercholesterolemia) in the current visit, there is strong and explicit evidence that this diagnosis will be coded in the next hospital visit, regardless of the other complex cardiovascular and metabolic issues present.
